meta.name: PiRC1 – Pi Ecosystem Token Design Database
meta.description: Complete structured database derived from PiRC1 specification

vision.title: Pi Launchpad – Utility-First Token Framework

pillars.name: Stake
pillars.description: Users stake Pi to receive PiPower, which determines maximum token allocation capacity.

pillars.name: Escrow
pillars.description: Committed Pi flows into an Escrow Wallet – never transferred to the project team.

pillars.name: Liquidity
pillars.description: All committed Pi and project tokens form a permanent, locked liquidity pool (LP).

pillars.name: Market Activation
pillars.description: TGE opens the LP/trading market for all users after the Allocation Period ends.

principles: Product-first: projects must have a working app before token launch
No Pi transferred to project teams – all Pi becomes liquidity
Anti-rug-pull via permanently locked initial liquidity

phases.name: Participation Window
phases.description: Users stake Pi → receive PiPower. Simultaneously engage with the project's live app. At window close, staking and engagement are snapshotted.

phases.name: Allocation Period
phases.description: Launchpad forms permanent liquidity pool. Tokens distributed to participants per allocation design.

phases.name: TGE (Token Generation Event)
phases.description: LP and trading market open for all. Tokens immediately usable for their utility.

phases.name: Post-TGE
phases.description: Ongoing unlock schedules enforced. Community governance and engagement incentives continue.

liquidity_rules.initial_lp_withdrawal: Permanently disabled for project Escrow Wallet
liquidity_rules.lp_accessible_to: All users for Pi ⟺ Token swaps or new liquidity deposits
liquidity_rules.project_lp_contribution: Project contributes additional tokens to pair with Pioneer Pi commitments

pipower_formula.description: PiPower ∝ (user staked Pi) / (total staked Pi in network) × T_available

variables.T_available: Total tokens provided by project for participants
variables.staked_pi_total: Total Pi staked across all participants in launch

baseline_pipower_eligibility.condition: Active Pi lockup ≥ 90% of mined tokens for ≥ 3 years
baseline_pipower_eligibility.purpose: Acknowledge Long-Term Lockers who may lack unlocked Pi to stake

engagement_measurement.effect: Engagement rank determines effective pricing / bonus discounts at allocation

design1.name: Design 1 – Stability-Oriented Model
design1.description: Equal token buckets for purchase and liquidity. Moderate engagement-based bonuses. Smooth price discovery.
design1.engagement_bonus: Moderate – small discount tiers based on engagement rank

design2.name: Design 2 – Engagement-Weighted Model
design2.description: Hybrid fixed-price + swap mechanism. Larger discounts for highly engaged users. Lock-up proportional to discount.
design2.engagement_bonus: Large – up to significant discount for top-ranked participants
design2.lock_up_rule: Lock-up period proportional to discount level received

common_rules: Unlock schedules for projects not more favorable than community unlock schedules
All Pi commitments flow to LP, never to project
Escrow Wallet permanently restricted from withdrawing initial liquidity
